title: Baselines (commit pins)
description: Per-locale baseline pins. Each entry records the SHA at which a locale's content was deemed correct, plus invariants and either a retro_id or a justification_doc. Per SPEC.md §1, §2.2.

baselines.description: Map of locale code (e.g. de_AT) to baseline entry.

baselineEntry.description: A single baseline pin. Requires retro_id OR justification_doc (anyOf — both may be present, e.g. when a justification existed before the retro was filed).

invariants.description: Properties that must hold at this baseline (e.g. register.formality=Sie, glossary.secret_object=Geheimnis).

justification_doc.description: Path to a doc justifying the pin (e.g. reviews/<date>/<file>.md).
